creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Älven,

Is there a reason why you don't want to upgrade to v2.0.0[1]? This version also seems to work and is used by ArchLinux, for example[2].


[1] https://github.com/icculus/smpeg/releases/tag/release_2_0_0
[2] https://archlinux.org/packages/extra/x86_64/smpeg/
